common.appDescription: Marketplace for buying and selling used cars in South Korea
common.loadErrorDescription: Check your connection and try again.

auth.signInToContinue: Sign in with Telegram to continue
auth.signInForFavorites: Sign in with Telegram to view your favorites
auth.signInForProfile: Sign in with Telegram to view your profile
auth.signInForCreate: Sign in with Telegram to create a listing
auth.signInForAdmin: Sign in with Telegram to access the admin dashboard
auth.devLoginHint: Telegram login is not available in a normal browser. Use dev login to test upload and create listing on localhost.

home.tagline: Premium used cars from Korea. Browse, compare, connect.
home.noListingsDescription: Be the first to list a car on the marketplace.

search.title: Search
search.subtitle: Find your next car
search.listingsFound: {count, plural, one {# listing found} other {# listings found}}
search.noMatchesDescription: Try adjusting your filters or search terms.
search.filtersActive: {count, plural, one {# filter active} other {# filters active}}

listing.sellSubtitle: Add photos and details to publish your listing
listing.title: Title
listing.contactPhoneHint: Optional. Buyers can call this number if you have no Telegram username.
listing.soldDescription: This car has been sold. Browse similar listings.
listing.soldDescriptionOwner: Marked as sold. Buyers can no longer contact you.
listing.notFoundDescription: This listing may have been deleted.
listing.deleteConfirm: Delete this listing? This cannot be undone.

favorites.title: Favorites
favorites.subtitle: Your saved cars
favorites.savedCount: {count, plural, one {# saved listing} other {# saved listings}}
favorites.emptyDescription: Tap the heart on any listing to save it here.

profile.activeListings: {count, plural, one {# active listing} other {# active listings}}
profile.noListingsDescription: Create your first listing to start selling.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: App preferences
settings.themeDescription: Light, dark, or match your device settings
settings.themeDescriptionTelegram: Light, dark, or follow Telegram theme automatically
settings.phoneDescription: Optional. Buyers can call you if you have no Telegram username.
settings.supportDescription: Send a question, suggestion, or report an issue. Your message is delivered to admin via the bot.
settings.supportPlaceholder: e.g. I have trouble posting a listing...
settings.supportSent: Your message was sent. We will get back to you soon.

seller.title: Seller
seller.inquiryHint: Your message is sent through our bot. The seller will reply in Telegram.
seller.inquiryPlaceholder: Hi, I'm interested in this car. Is it still available?
seller.inquirySent: Inquiry sent. Open the bot chat to receive replies.

admin.title: Admin
admin.accessDenied: Your account does not have permission to view this area.
admin.totalListings: {count, plural, one {# total listing} other {# total listings}}
admin.noListingsOnPlatform: No listings on the platform yet.
admin.registeredUsers: {count, plural, one {# registered user} other {# registered users}}
admin.searchUsersPlaceholder: Search by name, username, Telegram ID…
admin.banConfirm: Are you sure you want to ban this user?
admin.unbanConfirm: Are you sure you want to unban this user?
admin.listingsCount: {count, plural, one {# listing} other {# listings}} · ID {telegramId}
admin.broadcastDescription: Send a message to all registered users via the bot.
admin.broadcastPlaceholder: e.g. New listings are live — open the Mini App!
admin.broadcastConfirm: Send this message to all users?
admin.broadcastResult: Total: {total} · Delivered: {sent} · Bot not started: {notStarted} · Failed: {failed}
admin.broadcastRecipients: Will be sent to {count, plural, one {# user} other {# users}}
